app.title.description: Main app name displayed on the home screen.
app.title.notes: Do not translate the app name.

app.subtitle.description: Prompt below the title directing users to pick a game.

nav.back.notes: Keep short. The arrow ← may be kept or replaced with the locale's equivalent.

nav.backLabel.description: Accessibility label for the back button.

theme.label.description: Row label next to the theme mode selector.

theme.light.description: Theme toggle button text for switching to light mode.

theme.system.description: Segmented-control option that follows the OS light/dark preference.
theme.system.notes: Short — fits a compact 3-way segmented control alongside 'Light' and 'Dark'.

theme.dark.description: Theme toggle button text for switching to dark mode.

theme.switchTo.description: Accessibility label for the theme toggle. {{mode}} is 'light' or 'dark'.
theme.switchTo.notes: {{mode}} will already be translated by the time it is interpolated.

theme.lightShort.description: Short version of 'Light mode' for compact header buttons.

theme.darkShort.description: Short version of 'Dark mode' for compact header buttons.

lang.switcherLabel.description: Accessibility label for the language selector control.
